name: conduyt-pp-mcp
description: AI-native CRM for the terminal — manage contacts, deals, pipelines, automations, email sequences, SMS drip campaigns, invoices, and 70+ resource types. Local SQLite sync, compound insight queries (pipeline health, deal velocity, email stats), and MCP code-orchestration for agent integration.

conduyt_bearer_auth.title: CONDUYT_BEARER_AUTH
conduyt_bearer_auth.description: Sets CONDUYT_BEARER_AUTH for the Conduyt MCP server.
